help.agent.adaptive_system_prompt_token_: Automatically adjusts the token budget to the model's context window size. Recommended with token budget = 0.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.always_include: Tool names always offered regardless of adaptive selection.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.clean_transiti: Fjerner forældet værktøjsovergangsdata efter X dage.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.decay_half_lif: Half-life for usage scoring in days. Older usage data loses influence. Higher values = slower forgetting.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.enabled: Lærer fra forbrugshistorik, hvilke værktøjer der bruges mest, og prioriterer dem. Mindre brugte værktøjer tilbydes sjældnere.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.max_tools: Maximum number of tools offered to the LLM at once. Reduces token consumption.
help.agent.adaptive_tools.weight_success: Foretrækker værktøjer med højere succesrater i adaptiv udvælgelse.
help.agent.additional_prompt: Arbitrary text that is always appended at the end of the system prompt. Ideal for user-specific rules, context info, or fixed instructions that should apply to every request.
help.agent.allow_filesystem_write: When disabled, only read operations (list, read) are allowed. Write operations (write, delete, move, mkdir…) are blocked.
help.agent.allow_mcp: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to connect to external MCP servers (Model Context Protocol) and use their tools. MCP servers are external processes that can execute arbitrary code — only add trusted servers!
help.agent.allow_network_requests: When disabled, the agent blocks all api_request calls. Other integrations (Telegram, Discord…) are unaffected.
help.agent.allow_python: When disabled, the agent blocks execute_python, execute_skill and save_tool.
help.agent.allow_remote_shell: When disabled, execute_remote_shell / remote_execution are blocked.
help.agent.allow_self_update: When disabled, the agent cannot run manage_updates (no automatic self-updates).
help.agent.allow_shell: When disabled, the agent blocks all execute_shell requests with a PERMISSION DENIED error.
help.agent.allow_web_scraper: Deprecated — use tools.web_scraper.enabled in the 'Tools & Services' section instead.
help.agent.announcement_detector.enabled: Opdager, når LLM kun meddeler en handling (f.eks. 'Lad mig tjekke det…') uden faktisk at kalde et værktøj, og prøver automatisk igen for at få et rigtigt svar.
help.agent.announcement_detector.max_ret: Maksimalt antal korrigerende forsøg pr. bruger-runde, når et rent meddelelsessvar opdages. Agenten beder modellen igen om faktisk at udføre handlingen. Standard: 2.
help.agent.background_tasks.enabled: Lader agenten starte asynkrone opfølgende opgaver, efter hovedsvaret er sendt.
help.agent.background_tasks.follow_up_de: Wait time after the main response in seconds before a follow-up task starts.
help.agent.background_tasks.http_timeout: Maximum wait time for HTTP requests within background tasks.
help.agent.background_tasks.max_retries: Maksimalt antal automatiske genforsøg for mislykkede baggrundsopgaver.
help.agent.background_tasks.retry_delay_: Wait time between retry attempts in seconds.
help.agent.background_tasks.wait_default: Maximum wait time for a background task to complete. Default: 600 seconds (10 minutes).
help.agent.background_tasks.wait_poll_in: Hvor ofte agenten tjekker status for en ventende opgave (i sekunder).
help.agent.context_window: Total context window size in tokens. The agent uses this to calculate available capacity. 0 = auto-detect from model.
help.agent.core_memory_cap_mode: Gedrag wanneer de limiet is bereikt: "soft" voegt de invoer toe en retourneert een waarschuwing, "hard" weigert nieuwe invoer. Standaard: soft.
help.agent.debug_mode: Enables debug mode with extended error messages.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.enabled: Aktiverer Emotion Synthesizer. Genererer natursprogsbeskrivelser af agentens følelsesmæssige tilstand baseret på stemning, samtalecontekst og personlighedstræk. Kræver Personality Engine V2.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.max_histo: Maksimalt antal poster i følelseshistorikken. Ældre poster ryddes under vedligeholdelse. Standard: 100.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.min_inter: Minimumsinterval i sekunder mellem følelsessyntesekaldd. Forhindrer overdreven LLM-brug. Standard: 60.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.trigger_a: Trigger emotion synthesis after every V2 mood analysis, regardless of mood change. More expressive but uses more tokens. Default: off.
help.agent.emotion_synthesizer.trigger_o: Udløs følelsessyntese når stemningen ændres (detekteret af V2-analyse). Standard: fra.
help.agent.max_tool_guides: Maximum number of tool manuals embedded in the system prompt. Fewer = shorter prompt but less tool knowledge.
help.agent.memory_compression_char_limit: Messages exceeding this character limit are automatically summarized to save tokens in the context window.
help.agent.optimizer_enabled: Automatically shortens the system prompt when the context window runs low. Unused manuals are removed to save space.
help.agent.personality_engine: Schakelt de personality engine in met stemming en micro-traits. Wordt automatisch ingeschakeld wanneer Personality Engine V2 actief is.
help.agent.personality_engine_v2: Schakelt de geavanceerde V2-engine in met asynchrone LLM stemminganalyse. Schakelt automatisch V1 ook in (vereiste afhankelijkheid).
help.agent.personality_v2_api_key: Optional custom API key for the V2 engine. Usually 'ollama' for Ollama.
help.agent.personality_v2_model: Model name for the Personality Engine V2, e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini' or 'llama3.1'.
help.agent.personality_v2_provider: Legacy kompatibilitetsfelt. Helper-ejet personaanalyse bruger nu den centrale Helper LLM fra LLM-indstillingerne.
help.agent.personality_v2_timeout_secs: Timeout in seconds for the asynchronous V2 mood analysis LLM call. Default: 30.
help.agent.personality_v2_url: Optional custom base URL for V2, e.g. for a local Ollama ('http://localhost:11434/v1').
help.agent.recovery.duplicate_consecutiv: Antal fortløbende identiske svar opdaget som en løkke.
help.agent.recovery.duplicate_frequency_: Hvor mange gange det samme svar kan optræde i historikken før en løkke opdages.
help.agent.recovery.identical_tool_error: Hvor mange gange den samme værktøjsfejl kan optræde i træk før agenten afbryder.
help.agent.recovery.max_provider_422_rec: Hvor mange gange agenten forsøger at komme sig fra udbyderens '422 Bad Request'-fejl før opgivelse.
help.agent.recovery.min_messages_for_emp: Minimum antal beskeder i historikken før agenten genprøver ved tomme svar.
help.agent.show_tool_results: Shows tool results in the chat window as collapsible debug blocks.
help.agent.step_delay_seconds: Delay between tool calls in seconds. 0 = no delay.
help.agent.sudo_enabled: Enables execute_sudo. The sudo password must be stored in the vault under the key 'sudo_password'.
help.agent.system_prompt_token_budget: Maximum token count for the system prompt. The optimizer trims to this limit. 0 = auto-calculate.
help.agent.tool_output_limit: Tool responses exceeding this character limit are truncated. Prevents token waste from overly long outputs.
help.agent.user_profiling: Schakelt automatisch gebruikersprofiel in: de agent detecteert voorkeuren en gewoonten uit de chat en slaat ze op (vereist Personality Engine V2).
help.agent.user_profiling_threshold: Minimum confidence (number of confirmations) before a profile attribute is injected into the system prompt. Default: 2.
help.agent.workflow_feedback: Schakelt occasionele statusupdates in tijdens lange workflows (bijv. "Een ogenblik geduld...").
help.ai_gateway.account_id: Dit Cloudflare Account ID. Findes i Cloudflare-dashboardet under Workers & Pages.
help.ai_gateway.enabled: Enable Cloudflare AI Gateway to proxy all LLM API requests. Provides caching, rate-limiting, logging, and analytics. Local providers (Ollama) are excluded.
help.ai_gateway.gateway_id: Navnet eller slug for din AI Gateway-instans i Cloudflare.
help.ai_gateway.token: Optional Cloudflare AI Gateway token for authenticated gateways. Stored securely in the encrypted vault and sent as the cf-aig-authorization header.
help.ansible.container_name: (Sidecar mode only) Docker container name for the auto-managed Ansible sidecar. Default: 'aurago_ansible'.
help.ansible.default_inventory: (Local mode only) Default inventory file (e.g. '/etc/ansible/hosts'). Env var: ANSIBLE_INVENTORY.
help.ansible.enabled: Enables the Ansible integration. Supports two modes: 'sidecar' (Docker API) and 'local' (ansible CLI directly on the host).
help.ansible.image: (Sidecar mode only) Docker image for the Ansible sidecar container. Default: 'aurago-ansible:latest'. Build with: docker build -f Dockerfile.ansible -t aurago-ansible .
help.ansible.mode: Execution mode: 'sidecar' = Ansible API container (Docker), 'local' = call ansible binaries directly on the host. Default: 'sidecar'.
help.ansible.playbooks_dir: (Local mode only) Directory containing Ansible playbooks (e.g. '/opt/ansible/playbooks'). Env var: ANSIBLE_PLAYBOOKS_DIR.
help.ansible.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only check status, inventory, and list playbooks but cannot run ad-hoc commands or playbooks.
help.ansible.timeout: Maximum runtime for Ansible commands in seconds (default: 300). Increase for long-running playbooks.
help.ansible.token: (Sidecar mode only) Bearer token for the Ansible sidecar API. Must match ANSIBLE_API_TOKEN in the container.
help.ansible.url: (Sidecar mode only) URL of the Ansible API server. Default: 'http://ansible:5001'.
help.brave_search.api_key: Brave Search subscription token (X-Subscription-Token). Get a free or paid key at https://brave.com/search/api/ — the free tier allows 2000 requests/month.
help.brave_search.country: Default country code for localised results, e.g. 'DE' or 'US'. Leave blank for global search.
help.brave_search.enabled: Enable the Brave Search integration. Allows web searches via the Brave Search API with high-quality, up-to-date results.
help.brave_search.lang: Standardsøgesprog som kort kode, f.eks. 'de' eller 'en'. AuraGo omsætter dette automatisk til et Brave-kompatibelt UI-locale som 'de-DE'. Agenten kan tilsidesætte det pr. forespørgsel.
help.budget.default_cost.input_per_milli: Default cost for 1 million input tokens if model is not listed.
help.budget.default_cost.output_per_mill: Default cost for 1 million output tokens if model is not listed.
help.budget.enforcement: Action on budget exceed: 'warn' = warning only, 'partial' = limited tools, 'full' = stop.
help.budget.reset_hour: Hour of the day (0-23) when the daily budget resets.
help.budget.warning_threshold: Percentage (0.0 to 1.0) at which a warning is triggered.
help.chromecast.enabled: Enables Chromecast integration for audio output.
help.chromecast.tts_port: Lokal port til TTS-filserveren til streaming til Chromecast.
help.circuit_breaker.llm_timeout_seconds: Maximum wait time for an LLM response in seconds. Request is aborted if exceeded.
help.circuit_breaker.maintenance_timeout: Maximum duration for maintenance tasks in minutes. Also: time without user activity before the agent automatically returns from maintenance mode.
help.circuit_breaker.max_tool_calls: Aborts the task if more tool calls than this value occur. Prevents infinite loops and uncontrolled token consumption.
help.circuit_breaker.retry_intervals: Wait times between automatic retry attempts, comma-separated (e.g. '30s,2m,10m'). Controls backoff behavior on errors.
help.co_agents.llm.provider: Select a provider from the provider management for Co-Agents. Empty = main LLM.
help.co_agents.max_concurrent: Maximum number of concurrently running Co-Agents.
help.discord.allowed_user_id: The only User ID the Discord bot will listen to.
help.discord.bot_token: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.
help.discord.default_channel_id: The ID of the default channel for startup messages.
help.discord.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read Discord messages but cannot send them.
help.docker.host: Optional remote Docker host (e.g. tcp://192.168.1.5:2375). Leave blank for local socket.
help.docker.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list and inspect Docker containers but cannot start, stop, create, or remove them.
help.egg_mode.egg_id: Unique egg ID (assigned by master). Env: AURAGO_EGG_ID.
help.egg_mode.enabled: Enables egg mode: This instance is a worker egg controlled by a master. Env: AURAGO_EGG_MODE.
help.egg_mode.master_url: WebSocket URL of the master (e.g. ws://master:8080/api/invasion/ws). Env: AURAGO_MASTER_URL.
help.egg_mode.nest_id: Nest ID where this egg is deployed. Env: AURAGO_NEST_ID.
help.egg_mode.shared_key: Shared HMAC key for master authentication. Env: AURAGO_SHARED_KEY.
help.email.from_address: Sender email address to be transmitted.
help.email.imap_host: IMAP server address for email reception.
help.email.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read emails but cannot send them.
help.email.smtp_host: SMTP server address for email sending.
help.email.watch_enabled: Watches the email inbox for new messages.
help.email.watch_folder: The mailbox folder to check for new mails (usually INBOX).
help.email.watch_interval_seconds: Interval in seconds to check the mailbox.
help.email_accounts.from_address: Sender email address. Empty = same as username.
help.email_accounts.id: Unique identifier of the email account (e.g. personal, work).
help.email_accounts.imap_host: IMAP server adresse for e-mail modtagelse.
help.email_accounts.name: Visningsnavn for e-mailkontoen.
help.email_accounts.smtp_host: SMTP server adresse for e-mail afsendelse.
help.email_accounts.watch_enabled: Enables the inbox watcher for this account.
help.email_accounts.watch_folder: The mailbox folder to check for new mails (usually INBOX).
help.email_accounts.watch_interval_secon: Interval in seconds to check this account's mailbox.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.container_p: Host port for the managed Ollama container (default: 11435). Must be free and different from other Ollama instances.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.enabled: Automatically starts a local Ollama container for embeddings. Ideal for fully local setups without external APIs.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.gpu_backend: GPU-backend til Ollama-containeren. 'auto' registrerer automatisk NVIDIA, AMD, Intel eller Vulkan. Sæt manuelt, hvis auto-detektering fejler. Brug 'vulkan' til ældre iGPU'er/APU'er uden ROCm-understøttelse.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.model: Embedding-model til Ollama (standard: 'nomic-embed-text'). Modellen downloades automatisk ved første start.
help.embeddings.local_ollama.use_host_gp: Passes the host's GPU devices into the container (Linux only). Enable for GPU-accelerated embeddings.
help.embeddings.multimodal: Aktiverer multimodale embeddings. Når aktivt indlejres billeder og lydfiler direkte som vektorer. Aktiver kun hvis embedding-modellen understøtter multimodalt input (f.eks. Voyage AI, Google multimodal-embedding). Scannede PDF'er med lidt udtrækbar tekst behandles automatisk som billeder.
help.embeddings.multimodal_format: API format for multimodal embedding requests. 'auto' detects the format based on the provider type. 'openai' uses the OpenAI-compatible format, 'vertex' uses the Google Vertex AI format.
help.embeddings.provider: Provider from the provider management used for embeddings. Model and URL are taken from the provider entry. 'disabled' turns off long-term memory entirely.
help.fallback_llm.enabled: Enables automatic failover to a backup LLM on errors.
help.fallback_llm.error_threshold: Number of sequential errors before switching to fallback model.
help.fallback_llm.probe_interval_seconds: Interval in seconds to probe and try restoring the primary model.
help.fallback_llm.provider: Provider from provider management for the fallback LLM. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.
help.github.base_url: Base URL of the GitHub API. Default: 'https://api.github.com'. For GitHub Enterprise, enter your own API URL.
help.github.default_private: When enabled, new repositories are created as 'private' by default. Otherwise as 'public'.
help.github.enabled: Enables the GitHub integration for repository and issue management.
help.github.owner: GitHub username or organization used as the default owner for API calls.
help.github.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read repos, issues, and PRs but cannot create, delete, or modify files.
help.github.token: Personal Access Token (PAT) for the GitHub API. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens with the required scopes (repo, issues, etc.). Stored encrypted in the vault.
help.home_assistant.access_token: Long-lived access token for Home Assistant auth.
help.home_assistant.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read device states but cannot call services (no toggling devices).
help.home_assistant.url: URL of the Home Assistant instance, e.g. 'http://192.168.1.100:8123'.
help.homepage.allow_container_management: Når aktiveret, kan agenten starte, stoppe, genopbygge og ødelægge udviklingscontaineren.
help.homepage.allow_deploy: Når aktiveret, kan agenten deploye færdige websites til en fjernserver via SFTP/SCP.
help.homepage.deploy_host: Hostnavn eller IP-adresse på fjernwebserveren til deployment.
help.homepage.deploy_path: Absolut sti på fjernserveren, hvor webstedsfiler uploades (f.eks. /var/www/html).
help.homepage.deploy_port: SSH port of the remote server. Default: 22.
help.homepage.enabled: Aktiverer det Docker-baserede webudviklingsværktøj. Docker-integration skal være aktiv.
help.homepage.webserver_domain: Valgfrit domæne til automatisk HTTPS via Let's Encrypt.
help.homepage.webserver_enabled: Starter en lokal Caddy-webserver i Docker til forhåndsvisning af websites. Understøtter automatisk HTTPS med et domæne.
help.homepage.webserver_internal_only: Når aktiveret, binder Caddy-containeren kun til 127.0.0.1 (localhost). Webserveren er da kun tilgængelig lokalt, ikke fra eksterne netværk.
help.homepage.webserver_port: Port for the local Caddy web server. Default: 8080.
help.homepage.workspace_path: Lokal mappe til webprojekter, monteret i Docker-containeren.
help.indexing.directories: List of directories to watch and index. Relative paths are resolved from the config directory. Default: ./knowledge.
help.indexing.enabled: Enables automatic file indexing. Files in configured folders are periodically scanned, converted to embeddings, and available to the agent as a knowledge base.
help.indexing.extensions: List of file extensions to index. Text files are read directly, documents (.pdf, .docx, .xlsx, .pptx, .odt, .rtf) are automatically extracted. Binary files (executables) are automatically rejected. Default: .txt, .md, .json, .csv, .log, .yaml, .yml, .pdf, .docx, .xlsx, .pptx, .odt, .rtf.
help.indexing.index_images: When enabled, image files (.jpg, .png, .gif, .webp, .bmp) are sent to the Vision LLM for analysis. The result is stored with filename and path in the embeddings. Warning: Can cause significant API costs with many images.
help.indexing.poll_interval_seconds: How often (in seconds) directories are checked for changes. Default: 60.
help.invasion_control.enabled: Enables the Invasion Control UI for managing sub-agents (Eggs) and deployment targets (Nests).
help.invasion_control.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list nests and eggs but cannot assign, hatch, stop, or send tasks/secrets.
help.koofr.app_password: App password for the Koofr API.
help.koofr.base_url: Base URL of the Koofr server (usually https://app.koofr.net).
help.koofr.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read and list files but cannot write, delete, or move them.
help.koofr.username: Email address for the Koofr login.
help.llm.helper_enabled: Aktiverer den dedikerede Helper LLM til intern analyse og baggrundsopgaver. Hvis deaktiveret, vil mange afhængige hjælpefunktioner ikke fungere fuldt ud.
help.llm.helper_model: Valgfri model-tilsidesættelse for Helper LLM. En mindre, hurtigere og billigere model anbefales normalt her.
help.llm.helper_provider: Udbyder fra udbyderstyring til Helper LLM. Denne model bruges til interne hjælpeopgaver og er adskilt fra Guardian-modellen.
help.llm.multimodal: Når aktiveret, konverterer AuraGo vedhæftede billeder i chat til multimodale `image_url`-dele til hoved-LLM-forespørgslen. Kræver en vision-kompetent model/udbyder. Advarsel: billeder kan markant øge kontekst/token-forbrug og omkostninger.
help.llm.multimodal_provider_types_extra: Valgfri liste over ekstra udbydertyper, der skal behandles som multimodal-kompatible for billeder (f.eks. tilføj "ollama", hvis dit Ollama-endpoint understøtter image parts).
help.llm.provider: Provider from provider management for the main LLM. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.
help.llm.structured_outputs: ⚠️ Enables Structured Outputs (strict mode) for tool calls. ONLY enable for models that support this (e.g. GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini). Incompatible models will return errors!
help.logging.enable_file_log: Writes logs additionally to a file.
help.maintenance.enabled: Enables the daily maintenance mode for self-updates.
help.maintenance.time: Time for the daily maintenance run (HH:MM format).
help.mcp.enabled: Enables the MCP integration. Additionally requires 'MCP Server Connections' to be enabled in the Danger Zone.
help.mcp_server.allowed_tools: Liste over værktøjsnavne eksponeret via MCP. Efterlad tom for at eksponere alle aktuelt aktiverede værktøjer.
help.mcp_server.enabled: Aktiver den indbyggede MCP-server for at eksponere AuraGo-værktøjer til eksterne AI-agenter via Streamable HTTP.
help.mcp_server.require_auth: When enabled, MCP clients must authenticate with a Bearer token or valid session cookie.
help.meshcentral.blocked_operations: Explicit deny-list for MeshCentral operations (e.g. ["run_command","power_action","wake"]). This policy is enforced in addition to readonly.
help.meshcentral.enabled: Enables the MeshCentral integration for remote device management.
help.meshcentral.login_token: Login token username (starts with ~t:), generated via MeshCentral → My Account → Login Tokens. Bypasses 2FA. The token password goes into the password field above.
help.meshcentral.password: Password for login. When using a login token: the token password generated by MeshCentral.
help.meshcentral.readonly: Skrivebeskyttet tilstand for MeshCentral. Tillader kun læseoperationer (vis grupper/enheder) og blokerer ændringer som opvågning, strømhandlinger eller kommandoudførelse.
help.meshcentral.url: Root URL of the MeshCentral installation (e.g. https://mesh.example.com or https://host/meshcentral). If MeshCentral runs on a sub-path, include it. No trailing slash.
help.meshcentral.username: Regular username for MeshCentral login. Ignored when a login token is set.
help.mqtt.broker: MQTT broker address in the format 'tcp://host:port' (e.g. 'tcp://localhost:1883') or 'ssl://host:port' for TLS.
help.mqtt.buffer_max_messages: Maximum number of messages to buffer. Oldest messages are discarded when the limit is reached. Default: 500.
help.mqtt.client_id: Client ID for the broker connection. Default: 'aurago'. Must be unique per broker.
help.mqtt.enabled: Enables the MQTT integration. Allows the agent to publish, receive, and subscribe to MQTT messages.
help.mqtt.password_help: Adgangskode til MQTT-godkendelse. Opbevares sikkert i den krypterede boks.
help.mqtt.qos: Default Quality of Service level: 0 = at most once, 1 = at least once, 2 = exactly once.
help.mqtt.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read MQTT messages but cannot publish, subscribe, or unsubscribe.
help.mqtt.relay_to_agent: When enabled, incoming MQTT messages are relayed as context to the agent.
help.mqtt.tls_ca_file: Path to the CA certificate file for TLS verification (optional, for custom CAs).
help.mqtt.tls_cert_file: Path to the client certificate file for mutual TLS authentication (optional).
help.mqtt.tls_insecure_skip_verify: Skip TLS certificate verification. WARNING: Use only for testing with self-signed certificates.
help.mqtt.tls_key_file: Sti til klientens private nøglefil til gensidig TLS-godkendelse (valgfrit).
help.mqtt.topics: Kommasepareret liste over emner at abonnere på ved opstart (f.eks. 'home/#, sensors/temperature').
help.mqtt.username: Username for MQTT authentication (optional, depending on broker configuration).
help.notifications.ntfy.topic: ntfy topic name for this AuraGo instance.
help.notifications.ntfy.url: ntfy server URL. Default: 'https://ntfy.sh'. Can be self-hosted.
help.ollama.enabled: Enables the Ollama integration for local LLM management.
help.ollama.managed_instance.container_p: Host port for the managed Ollama container (default: 11434). Must not conflict with other services.
help.ollama.managed_instance.default_mod: Modeller der automatisk hentes efter containerstart. Kommasepareret liste, f.eks. 'llama3,mistral'.
help.ollama.managed_instance.enabled: Opretter og administrerer automatisk en lokal Ollama Docker-container. Kræver at Docker er tilgængelig.
help.ollama.managed_instance.gpu_backend: GPU-backend for den administrerede container. 'auto' registrerer automatisk NVIDIA, AMD, Intel eller Vulkan. Brug 'vulkan' til ældre iGPU'er/APU'er uden ROCm-understøttelse.
help.ollama.managed_instance.memory_limi: Docker-hukommelsesgrænse for containeren, f.eks. '8g' eller '512m'. Lad stå tom for ubegrænset.
help.ollama.managed_instance.use_host_gp: Passes the host GPU devices into the container for hardware-accelerated inference (Linux only).
help.ollama.managed_instance.volume_path: Værtssti for vedvarende modellagring. Lad stå tom for at bruge et Docker-administreret volume.
help.ollama.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list and show models but cannot pull, delete, load, or unload them.
help.ollama.url: URL of the Ollama API. Default: 'http://localhost:11434'.
help.paperless_ngx.api_token: API token for the Paperless-ngx instance. Stored in the vault.
help.paperless_ngx.enabled: Enables the Paperless-ngx integration for document management.
help.paperless_ngx.read_only: Når aktiveret, kan agenten kun søge og læse dokumenter, men kan ikke uploade, opdatere eller slette dem.
help.paperless_ngx.url: URL of the Paperless-ngx instance (e.g. https://paperless.example.com).
help.personality.core_personality: Aktiv personlighedsprofil, f.eks. neutral, punk, zen.
help.personality.emotion_synthesizer.ena: Aktiverer Emotion Synthesizer. Kræver Personality Engine V2.
help.personality.emotion_synthesizer.min: Minimalt interval i sekunder mellem emotionssyntese. Standard: 60.
help.personality.engine: Enables the personality engine with mood and micro-traits. Automatically enabled when Personality Engine V2 is active.
help.personality.engine_v2: Aktiverer den avancerede V2-motor med asynkron LLM-stemningsanalyse.
help.personality.inner_voice.decay_turns: Antal samtalerunder før en indre stemme-tanker forsvinder fra prompten. Standard: 3.
help.personality.inner_voice.enabled: Aktiverer den Indre Stemme / underbevidste nudge-motor. Genererer subtile adfærdsmæssige skub baseret på agentens følelsesmæssige tilstand. Kræver Emotion Synthesizer og Personality Engine V2.
help.personality.inner_voice.error_strea: Minimale fortløbende fejl før fejlstrig-udløseren affyrer en indre stemme-nudge. Standard: 2.
help.personality.inner_voice.max_per_ses: Maksimalt antal indre stemme-tanker pr. samtale. Standard: 20.
help.personality.inner_voice.min_interva: Minimale sekunder mellem genereringer af indre stemme. Forhindrer overdreven LLM-brug. Standard: 60.
help.personality.user_profiling: Aktiverer automatisk brugerprofil fra samtalen (kræver V2).
help.personality.user_profiling_threshol: Minimum confidence (number of confirmations) before a profile attribute is injected into the system prompt. Default: 2.
help.personality.v2_api_key: Optional custom API key for the V2 engine. Usually 'ollama' for Ollama.
help.personality.v2_provider: Legacy kompatibilitetsfelt. Helper-ejet personaanalyse bruger nu den centrale Helper LLM fra LLM-indstillingerne.
help.personality.v2_timeout_secs: Timeout i sekunder for det asynkrone V2 LLM-kald. Standard: 30.
help.personality.v2_url: Optional custom base URL for V2, e.g. for a local Ollama ('http://localhost:11434/v1').
help.providers.account_id: Cloudflare Account ID for Workers AI providers. Required when using the workers-ai provider type.
help.proxmox.enabled: Enables the Proxmox VE integration for virtualization management.
help.proxmox.insecure: Disable TLS certificate verification. Enable for self-signed certificates.
help.proxmox.node: Standard nodenavn, f.eks. 'pve'. Bruges når ingen node er angivet.
help.proxmox.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list and inspect VMs/containers but cannot start, stop, or create snapshots.
help.proxmox.token_id: API token ID in the format 'user@pam!tokenname'.
help.proxmox.url: URL of the Proxmox VE API, e.g. 'https://pve.example.com:8006'.
help.rocketchat.url: URL of the Rocket.Chat instance, e.g. 'https://chat.example.com'.
help.rocketchat.user_id: Bot user ID from Rocket.Chat (Profile > Personal Access Tokens).
help.s3.access_key: Access Key ID for S3 authentication. Stored encrypted in the vault.
help.s3.bucket: Default bucket name. Can also be specified per API call.
help.s3.enabled: Aktiverer S3-kompatibel lagringsintegration (AWS S3, MinIO, Wasabi, Backblaze B2).
help.s3.endpoint: S3 endpoint URL (e.g. https://s3.amazonaws.com or http://minio.local:9000). Leave blank for AWS default.
help.s3.insecure: Tillad HTTP (ikke-TLS) endepunkter. Aktiver kun for lokale/udviklingsmiljøer.
help.s3.read_only: Når aktiveret, kan agenten kun liste og downloade objekter, men kan ikke uploade, slette, kopiere eller flytte dem.
help.s3.region: AWS-region (f.eks. us-east-1). Kræves for AWS S3, valgfrit for MinIO.
help.s3.secret_key: Secret Access Key til S3-godkendelse. Krypteret i boksen.
help.s3.use_path_style: Aktiver sti-stil adressering (kræves for MinIO og de fleste S3-kompatible tjenester).
help.sandbox.auto_install: Installer automatisk llm-sandbox Python-pakken (med MCP-ekstra) ved opstart. Installerer 'llm-sandbox[mcp-docker]' eller 'llm-sandbox[mcp-podman]' afhængigt af backend. Kræver et fungerende Python/pip-miljø.
help.sandbox.backend: Container-backend: 'docker' (standard) eller 'podman'. Docker skal være installeret og tilgængelig.
help.sandbox.docker_host: Docker host address (e.g. 'unix:///var/run/docker.sock' or 'tcp://localhost:2375'). Empty = auto-detect or inherit from docker.host.
help.sandbox.enabled: Enables isolated code execution in Docker containers. The agent will use execute_sandbox as the default tool for writing and running code.
help.sandbox.keep_alive: Holder sandbox-MCP-serveren kørende mellem kald i stedet for at genstarte den hver gang.
help.sandbox.network_enabled: Allows sandbox containers to access the network. Disabled by default for maximum isolation.
help.sandbox.pool_size: Antal forvarmede containere i puljen (0 = ingen pulje). Højere værdier fremskynder udførelse men bruger flere ressourcer.
help.sandbox.timeout_seconds: Maximum execution time per sandbox call in seconds (default: 30).
help.server.bridge_address: TCP address for the Lifeboat bridge connection (host:port). Default: 'localhost:8089'.
help.server.host: IP address the server listens on. '127.0.0.1' = local only, '0.0.0.0' = all interfaces.
help.server.https.domain: Public domain name (e.g. aurago.mydomain.com). Both port 80 and 443 must be forwarded to AuraGo for Let's Encrypt to work.
help.server.https.email: Contact email for Let's Encrypt. Used for certificate expiry warnings. Not publicly displayed.
help.server.https.enabled: Enables HTTPS via Let's Encrypt. AuraGo will automatically obtain and renew a certificate for your domain. HTTP (port 80) from external sources is redirected to HTTPS. Localhost remains accessible via HTTP.
help.server.max_body_bytes: Maximum HTTP request body size in bytes (config endpoint). Default: 10485760 (10 MB).
help.server.port: Port for the web server and REST API.
help.sqlite.invasion_path: Path to SQLite database for Invasion Control (Nests/Eggs). Default: './data/invasion.db'.
help.sqlite.site_monitor_path: Sti til SQLite-database for Site Monitor (registrering af ændringer på hjemmesider). Standard: './data/site_monitor.db'.
help.tailscale.api_key: Tailscale API key (starts with 'tskey-api-'). Create at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys.
help.tailscale.enabled: Enables the Tailscale integration for VPN network management.
help.tailscale.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list devices and status but cannot enable or disable routes.
help.tailscale.tailnet: Tailnet name, e.g. 'example.com', or leave blank for the default tailnet ('-').
help.telegram.max_concurrent_workers: Maximum number of concurrently processed Telegram messages. Default: 5.
help.telegram.telegram_user_id: Your Telegram user ID for authorization.
help.tools.form_automation.enabled: Aktiverer formularautomatiseringsværktøjet (form_automation). Bruger en headless Chromium-browser til at udfylde og indsende webformularer. Kræver tools.web_capture.enabled: true.
help.tools.inventory.enabled: Schakelt apparaatinventarisatievragen in. Staat de agent toe om geregistreerde apparaten op te vragen.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.enabled: Enables the knowledge graph tool. Allows the agent to manage nodes and edges in the graph.
help.tools.knowledge_graph.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only search the graph but cannot add or delete nodes or edges.
help.tools.memory.enabled: Enables core memory tools (manage_memory, query_memory). Allows the agent to store and retrieve facts.
help.tools.memory.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read memories but cannot add, update, or delete them.
help.tools.memory_maintenance.enabled: Enables memory maintenance tools (archive_memory, optimize_memory). Allows the agent to archive and optimize memories.
help.tools.missions.enabled: Enables Mission Control (manage_missions). Allows the agent to manage automation missions.
help.tools.missions.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only view missions but cannot create, update, delete, or run them.
help.tools.network_scan.enabled: Aktiverer mDNS-netværks-skanværktøjet (mdns_scan). Finder enheder på det lokale netværk via Bonjour/ZeroConf.
help.tools.notes.enabled: Enables notes/todo management (manage_notes). Allows the agent to manage notes and tasks.
help.tools.notes.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only view notes but cannot create, update, or delete them.
help.tools.python_secret_injection.enabl: Allows Python tools (execute_python, execute_sandbox, execute_skill, run_tool) to request vault secrets via the vault_keys parameter. Secrets are injected as AURAGO_SECRET_<KEY> environment variables. Only user/agent-created secrets are accessible — system and integration secrets are blocked. Disabled by default for security.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.allowed_to: Vælg hvilke native AuraGo-værktøjer Python-færdigheder må kalde via tool-bridgen. Værktøjet skal også være angivet i skillens manifest (internal_tools). Lad stå tomt for at blokere alle bridge-kald.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.allowed_sq: Vælg hvilke SQL-forbindelsesnavne Python-færdigheder må bruge, når de kalder sql_query via værktøjsbroen. Lad stå tomt for at blokere SQL-bro-kald.
help.tools.python_tool_bridge.enabled: Tillader Python-skills at kalde native AuraGo-værktøjer (f.eks. proxmox, docker_management) direkte via en intern HTTP-bridge. Skills skal deklarere nødvendige værktøjer i deres manifest (internal_tools-feltet), og værktøjsnavnene skal være hvidlistet i python_tool_bridge.allowed_tools. Deaktiveret som standard af sikkerhedshensyn.
help.tools.scheduler.enabled: Enables the scheduler tool (cron_scheduler). Allows the agent to schedule recurring tasks.
help.tools.scheduler.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only view scheduled jobs but cannot add or remove them.
help.tools.secrets_vault.enabled: Enables the secrets vault tool. Allows the agent to read and store encrypted secrets.
help.tools.secrets_vault.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read secrets but cannot store or modify them.
help.tools.stop_process.enabled: Enables the ability to stop processes. When disabled, the agent can only list processes.
help.tools.upnp_scan.enabled: Aktiverer UPnP-skanværktøjet (upnp_scan). Finder UPnP/SSDP-enheder på det lokale netværk.
help.tools.web_scraper.enabled: When disabled, the web_scraper skill is blocked. The agent will not be able to fetch external websites.
help.tools.web_scraper.summary_mode: When enabled, scraped content is summarized through the central Helper LLM. This reduces tokens, batches helper work where possible, and hardens against prompt injection.
help.tools.web_scraper.summary_provider: Legacy-kompatibilitetsfelt. Websammendrag bruger nu den centrale Helper LLM fra LLM-indstillingerne.
help.tools.wol.enabled: Enables the Wake-on-LAN tool. The agent can send a magic packet to wake up devices that have a MAC address registered in the device manager. Requires devices to support WOL and be reachable on the local network.
help.tts.language: BCP-47 sprogkode til Google TTS, f.eks. 'da' eller 'en'.
help.virustotal.api_key: API Key for VirusTotal tool. WARNING: DO NOT use this tool on files containing personal data or sensitive information. Files may be made available to security researchers and your submissions may be made public.
help.virustotal.enabled: Enable the VirusTotal integration. Allows scanning URLs, domains, IPs, and file hashes via the VirusTotal API.
help.vision.api_key: API Key for the vision LLM.
help.vision.base_url: Base URL for the vision LLM.
help.vision.model: Model name for the vision LLM.
help.vision.provider: Select a provider from the provider management for image analysis.
help.web_config.enabled: Enables the web configuration page at /config. Disabled by default for security.
help.webdav.auth_type: Choose whether AuraGo should use Basic Auth with username and password, or a Bearer token.
help.webdav.password: Adgangskode eller app-adgangskode til Basic Auth. Gemmes sikkert i Vault.
help.webdav.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only read and list files but cannot write, delete, or move them.
help.webdav.token: Bearer token for servers that expect an Authorization: Bearer … header. Stored securely in the vault.
help.webhooks.enabled: Enables the webhook system. Allows up to 10 incoming webhooks with token authentication.
help.webhooks.max_payload_size: Maximum payload size in bytes per webhook request. Default: 65536 (64 KB).
help.webhooks.rate_limit: Maximum webhook requests per minute per token. 0 = unlimited.
help.webhooks.read_only: When enabled, the agent can only list webhooks and read logs but cannot create, update, or delete them.
help.whisper.mode: Whisper-tilstand: 'whisper' (standard OpenAI API), 'multimodal' (Gemini/multimodal LLM) eller 'local' (lokal server).
help.whisper.provider: Vælg en udbyder fra udbyderstyringen til tale-til-tekst.
